content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across capital goods, defense, chemicals, auto-ancillaries, FMCG and financials post strong Q4 prints. Most held positions are showing gains today (TITAGARH +9.84%, GRSE +9.20%, COFORGE +11.07%, MARICO +4.84%, CAMS +10.46%, ABCAPITAL +6.61%, NAVINFLUOR +3.72%, ADANIPORTS at 52-wk high). Focus shifts to trailing SLs aggressively to lock in gains given sharp run-ups and concentrated binary events upcoming (HAL May 14, GABRIEL May 13, NEULANDLAB May 12).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Stored SL 1035 already above entry (good). Trail SL marginally to 1040 (1.6% below CMP, satisfies 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 beat, MOFSL Buy intact; let it run toward 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Marginal red, but gold structurally bullish (JPM target $5,055). Stored SL 121 (-2.5% from CMP) is appropriate. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. At 52-wk high after Q4 beat (revenue +26.5% YoY). Trail SL from 1725 to 1735 — locks in breakeven+ while staying 1.3% below CMP (above 1% floor)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Q4 results board meeting May 14 (5 sessions away — outside 3-session binary window for now, but approaching). Trail SL from 4540 to 4570 (-1.3% from CMP). Will reassess and likely tighten further or exit before May 13. Sector P/E stretched at 52, run-up risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Q4 already printed (PAT +124% YoY), specialty chem upcycle confirmed by SUMICHEM, Aarti. Stored SL 6960 already at breakeven+, sits 1.3% below CMP — keep as is, target intact at 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%. Stored SL 836 at -1.1% from CMP — already tight. No-op trail check: keeping unchanged is correct. HOLD effectively (same SL/target as stored). Reclassifying to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08% (flat). Stock at fresh ATH after Q4 beat (PAT +31% YoY). Stored SL 365 is 1% below CMP — appropriate. Target 388 still ~5% upside. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Stored SL 815 is 0.9% below CMP — borderline tight. Q4 beat, MOFSL target Rs 950. Keeping as stored — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Big +11% gap on Q4 + Encora. Stored SL 1253 is 2% below CMP — appropriate cushion for IT-sector volatility. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Stored SL 2990 is 1.45% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Q4 results already out (PAT +24% YoY), no binary risk. Keep as stored — effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. +10.46% gap-up day. Stored SL 800 is 0.9% below CMP — tight but Q4 already printed. HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in +5.5% gain from entry; SL 1.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal red, structural gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock breakeven+, ride 52-wk-high momentum to 1820."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board May 14; tighten now, plan exit/risk-trim before May 13."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 6960 already locks +0.9%; target 7400 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-Q4 results binary; SL 836 tight at -1.1% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry; ATH momentum, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already printed; SL 815 acceptable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big up-move; SL 1253 gives 2% room for IT volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already out; SL appropriate, target 3225 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 done; gap-up day, SL 800 tight but acceptable."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB (8461 vs ATH 8722, Q4 beat, brokerage targets 9800-10500): attractive but already in capital-goods cluster (TITAGARH, GRSE, HAL, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR-adjacent). GABRIEL: Q4 board May 13 — 4 sessions out, do NOT enter (binary calendar discipline). NEULANDLAB: Q4 board May 12 + recent -34.5% earnings surprise — avoid. HDFCBANK: governance overhang lingering, structural NIM compression — pass. CHOLAHLDNG, BAJAJ-AUTO: financial-services and auto names already represented via ABCAPITAL, GABRIEL theme — no add. Will monitor on next pulse for cleaner setups.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC positions, sector mix reasonable (Capital Goods 4 names: TITAGARH, HAL, GRSE — close to cluster cap; Financial Services 3: PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS; plus FMCG, IT, Chemicals, Services, ETF). NO new entries today — focus is risk management ahead of dense binary calendar (NEULAND May 12, GABRIEL May 13, HAL May 14, TITAGARH expected). Cumulative drawdown -53.7% is severe; the discipline now is to trail SLs aggressively, let winners run to targets, and avoid adding correlated risk into earnings clusters. Cash ratio currently shows 100% but holdings exist — assuming display anomaly. Will reassess pre-binary positions on next pulse (May 11)."
}
